task_completion.description: Verify the required layers are created with correct colors
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the LibreCAD Layer List panel, look for the presence of layers: 'CRANE_SETUP' (with a red color indicator), 'BUILDING' (white/black), 'LOAD_PATH' (green), and 'ANNOTATIONS' (yellow).

task_completion.description: Verify the crane setup elements are drawn
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the drawing area, look for a red rectangle (outrigger base) and a red circle (tail swing) centered at the same location (the origin).

task_completion.description: Verify the building wall is drawn
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a vertical white/black line representing the building wall. It should be located to the right of the crane center.

task_completion.description: Verify the load path elements are drawn
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for two green circles (one on the left side of the wall for the Pick Point, and one on the right side for the Set Point) with a green line connecting their centers.

task_completion.description: Verify the text annotations are added
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for yellow text labels reading 'CRANE CENTER', 'PICK', 'SET', and 'WALL' placed near their corresponding geometric elements in the drawing.

task_completion.description: Verify the drawing is saved with the correct filename
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the LibreCAD window title bar, save dialog, or a file explorer window to confirm the file is saved as 'crane_lift_plan.dxf'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the LibreCAD graphical interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent actively using LibreCAD's drawing tools, command line interface at the bottom, and layer management panels.

integrity.description: Verify the drawing consists of genuine CAD entities
integrity.visual_evidence: The elements should appear as standard vector lines, circles, and text within the LibreCAD workspace, not as an imported raster image or pasted screenshot.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a script to bypass GUI interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show the execution of a script (e.g., Python) or a command that directly generates the DXF file without manual drawing in LibreCAD.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: Expected filename is 'crane_lift_plan.dxf'. Required layers are 'CRANE_SETUP', 'BUILDING', 'LOAD_PATH', and 'ANNOTATIONS'. Crane tail swing radius is 3.6m. Building wall is at x=6.0. Pick point is at (-10.0, 5.0) and Set point is at (12.0, 8.0).
